short_description: IBM MQ channel SYSTEM.ADMIN.SVRCONN in RETRYING on QM1
description: Channel has been retrying for 20 minutes. Applications connecting to QM1 report 2059 connection refused. Queue depth on APP.REQUEST is climbing and now sits at 8200 of a 10000 maximum.
recent_changes: CHG0004411 — firewall rule update on the QM1 subnet, applied 08:55Z
CHG0004402 — MQ 9.3.5 fix pack applied to QM1, applied three days ago
past_incidents: INC0011980 — same channel RETRYING after a firewall change; resolved by restoring the rule
kb_articles: KB0010023 — Diagnosing MQ 2059 errors: check listener, channel status and firewall path
